card.flavor_text: "All right buddy, don't fail me now!"
card.name: Boomerang Basics
card.oracle_text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If you controlled that permanent, draw a card.

card.flavor_text:
Control lost is adventure gained.
—Keelhauler proverb
card.name: Bounce Off
card.oracle_text: Return target creature or Vehicle to its owner's hand.

card.name: Burst Lightning
card.oracle_text:
Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

card.name: Eddymurk Crab
card.oracle_text:
Flash
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard.
This creature enters tapped if it's not your turn.
When this creature enters, tap up to two target creatures.

card.name: Flow State
card.oracle_text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. If there is an instant card and a sorcery card in your graveyard, instead put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card_faces.name: Hearth Elemental
card_faces.oracle_text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the number of cards in your graveyard that are instant cards, sorcery cards, and/or have an Adventure.

card_faces.name: Stoke Genius
card_faces.oracle_text: Discard your hand, then draw two cards. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.flavor_text: Strixhaven students have a sense of humor. The spirits of the Blood Age do not.
card.name: Impractical Joke
card.oracle_text: Damage can't be prevented this turn. Impractical Joke deals 3 damage to up to one target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Namor the Sub-Mariner
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Namor's power is equal to the number of Merfolk you control.
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with one or more blue mana symbols in its mana cost, create that many 1/1 blue Merfolk creature tokens.

card.flavor_text: "It's easy to anticipate Captain Storm's orders: take the more dangerous route."
card.name: Opt
card.oracle_text:
Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
Draw a card.

card.name: Prismari Charm
card.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Surveil 2, then draw a card.
• Prismari Charm deals 1 damage to each of one or two targets.
• Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.flavor_text:
"While Loot's ability to predict Omenpaths is extraordinary, I'm more impressed by his unrelenting curiosity."
—Pia Nalaar
card.name: Riverpyre Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control an Island or a Mountain.

card_faces.name: Roaring Furnace
card_faces.oracle_text:
When you unlock this door, this Room deals damage equal to the number of cards in your hand to target creature an opponent controls.
(You may cast either half. That door unlocks on the battlefield. As a sorcery, you may pay the mana cost of a locked door to unlock it.)

card_faces.name: Steaming Sauna
card_faces.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
At the beginning of your end step, draw a card.
(You may cast either half. That door unlocks on the battlefield. As a sorcery, you may pay the mana cost of a locked door to unlock it.)

card.flavor_text: The farmer was amazed to see the penny vanish into thin air, but the goose knew he'd just slipped it to the faerie.
card.name: Sleight of Hand
card.oracle_text: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other on the bottom of your library.

card.flavor_text: The druid's aim was dead on. But their choice of target was dead wrong.
card.name: Spell Pierce
card.oracle_text: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.flavor_text: Shadowmoor merrow swindle and steal not only for profit but for spite.
card.name: Spell Snare
card.oracle_text: Counter target spell with mana value 2.

card.name: Spirebluff Canal
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.flavor_text: When darkness veils the world, four Warriors of Light shall come.
card.name: Starting Town
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless it's your first, second, or third turn of the game.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color.

card.flavor_text: The flamekin was drawn toward warm laughter when the skies darkened, then she turned back to the lonely peak.
card.name: Steam Vents
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.flavor_text:

—Veyran, dean of perfection
card.name: Stormcarved Coast
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Winternight Stories

Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard a creature card.
